title: Not gonna lie… this is getting harder to share publicly
author: Angela-Cole
selftext:
Been getting a lot of DMs lately about what I’m doing, and I didn’t expect that tbh.

The strategy itself isn’t complicated, but the way most people use it ends up ruining it.

That’s why I stopped explaining it openly here  it just turns into noise.

Right now I’m only discussing it with a small group of people who actually take it seriously.

If you’re consistent and not just chasing hype, you probably know what I mean.

replies.author: rivirside
replies.body: She’s just tRyINg to HElP us oUT

replies.author: Angela-Cole
replies.body: Don't give me too much credit, lolI'm just doing what I can (and sharing this while I'm at it), even though I'm not entirely sure if it will actually be of any help.

replies.author: rivirside
replies.body: For context she responded to me then deleted her comments twice, and is pestering my inbox
